issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in instructions.

scenarios.name: Launch 3 parallel Claude agents with auto-setup
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses raw git worktree add + manual npm install per directory; treatment uses .worktrunk.toml on_create hook plus wt switch -c -x to create and launch the agent in one command, then wt list to monitor.

scenarios.name: Share node_modules across worktrees
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests symlinks or pnpm; treatment uses the documented [create] copy = ["node_modules", ".next", "dist"] block in .worktrunk.toml plus [paths] template for predictable naming.
